item.title: Warner Bros. Interactive Entertainment - LEGO Marvel Super Heroes Code In Box Nintendo Switch
item.description: You’ve got Warner Bros. Interactive Entertainment - LEGO Marvel Super Heroes Code In Box Nintendo Switch at the following link: ℹ️: Featuring an original story crossing the entire Marvel Universe and filled with classic LEGO videogame adventure and humour, players take on the role of their favourite Marvel Super Heroes as they unite to stop a host of villains from destroying the world. Players will unlock more than 100 playable characters from across the Marvel Universe, including fan favourites like Black Widow, Loki, Spider-Man, Nick Fury, Iron Man, Wolverine, Captain America, Hulk, Thor, Hawkeye, Deadpool, and Galactus!
